# Synthetic Merger Proxy

<!-- PAGE 1 -->

## Background of the Merger

On January 5, 2024, Party A submitted an indication of interest.

On January 12, 2024, Party B proposed $12.50 per share in cash.

The board met to discuss whether the process had a formal boundary.

## Reasons for the Merger

The board believed the transaction provided compelling value for shareholders.

<!-- PAGE 2 -->

## Opinion of Financial Advisor

The financial advisor reviewed selected precedent transactions and trading data.

## Financing

Party B expected to fund the merger with cash on hand and committed financing.

## Interests of Directors and Executive Officers

The board also contacted 15 financial buyers during the process.

## No-Boundary Cycle Marker

Party A withdrew before any final-round invitation was delivered.
